feed.title: Journal of African Languages and Linguistics
feed.subtitle: Latest articles from Journal of African Languages and Linguistics (De Gruyter)

entry.title: Morphology of intransitive verbs in the Agar dialect of Dinka
entry.summary: Authors: Torben Andersen DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jall-2025-0041 Pages: Page range: 1-61

entry.title: Between standardization and diversity: a critical study of the polynomic approach in planning Amazigh languages in Morocco
entry.summary: Authors: Kefan Bao DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jall-2025-0010 Pages: Page range: 63-87

entry.title: ‘The leopard has given birth’: weather terms in Gisamjanga-Datooga
entry.summary: Authors: Amani Lusekelo, Roland Kießling, Stefan Bruckhaus DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jall-2024-0027 Pages: Page range: 89-134

entry.title: The heart and positive emotions: a view from Amharic
entry.summary: Authors: Sérgio N. Menete, Guiying Jiang, Betelhem Tirusew Bayu DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jall-2024-0026 Pages: Page range: 135-169

entry.title: Natural language ontology: diachronic restructuring of nominal classification in Dagaare
entry.summary: Authors: Isaac N. Mwinlaaru DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jall-2024-0028 Pages: Page range: 171-215
